This test should trigger a CSP violation by attempting to evaluate a string with setInterval.

Message[0]: csp-setInterval-warning-contains-stacktrace.js:18 Evaluating a string as JavaScript violates the following Content Security Policy directive because 'unsafe-eval' is not an allowed source of script: "script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'".
 The action has been blocked.
Stack Trace:

  url: test://evaluations/0/csp-setInterval-warning-contains-stacktrace.js
  function: thisTest
  line: 18
